title: benzoin angustifolium
intro: Benzoin angustifolium, also known as styrax, is a plant species belonging to the Styrax family, native to North America, characterized by its small white flowers and reddish-brown resin. The medicinal properties of benzoin angustifolium lie in its resin, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of benzoin angustifolium include its ability to soothe and protect skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. The herbal preparations of benzoin angustifolium include its use in tinctures, salves, and ointments, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
